channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: MuNDa invasion
item.description:
Source: TW

Thread by @blog_supplement on Thread Reader App – Thread Reader App

While many H go blue in the face denying a relatively obvious thing like the Aryan invasion they often ignore the 2 other incursions that played a notable role in shaping the populations of greater India. 1 of these is Austro-Asiatic invasion from east Asia which is below.

The Austroasiatic languages are a coherent family like IE with populations in India and East Asia like Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia. In India there are multiple branches in Meghalaya/greater Bengal like Khasic; Munda like Santhal; and Nicobaric of the Nicobar Islands.
